testcase.name: test_created_platform_admin_in_list

failure.message: AssertionError: Created user not in list. Found: ['admin@automateaccounts.local', 'cadrashtishah1@gmail.com', 'test-autoassign-1772309624@example.com', 'test-cancel-1772309625@example.com', 'test-autoassign-1772309797@example.com', 'test-cancel-1772309798@example.com', 'testpartner@example.com', 'partner.admin@testorg.local', 'partner.superadmin@testorg.local', 'partner.admin.1772331848@testorg.local', 'partner.superadmin.1772331848@testorg.local', 'partner.admin.1772331882@testorg.local', 'partner.superadmin.1772331882@testorg.local', 'partner.admin.1772331901@testorg.local', 'partner.superadmin.1772331901@testorg.local', 'partner.superadmin.default.1772331901@testorg.local', 'partner.admin.1772331917@testorg.local', 'partner.superadmin.1772331917@testorg.local', 'partner.superadmin.default.1772331917@testorg.local', 'partner.admin.1772331997@testorg.local'] assert 'TEST_platform-admin-iter164@test.local' in ['admin@automateaccounts.local', 'cadrashtishah1@gmail.com', 'test-autoassign-1772309624@example.com', 'test-cancel-1772309625@example.com', 'test-autoassign-1772309797@example.com', 'test-cancel-1772309798@example.com', ...] + where 'TEST_platform-admin-iter164@test.local' = <test_iter164_roles_permissions_redesign.TestPlatformAdminCreation object at 0xfdb6bbbb0a50>.TEST_EMAIL

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter164_roles_permissions_redesign.py:239: in test_created_platform_admin_in_list assert self.TEST_EMAIL in emails, f"Created user not in list. Found: {emails}" E AssertionError: Created user not in list. Found: ['admin@automateaccounts.local', 'cadrashtishah1@gmail.com', 'test-autoassign-1772309624@example.com', 'test-cancel-1772309625@example.com', 'test-autoassign-1772309797@example.com', 'test-cancel-1772309798@example.com', 'testpartner@example.com', 'partner.admin@testorg.local', 'partner.superadmin@testorg.local', 'partner.admin.1772331848@testorg.local', 'partner.superadmin.1772331848@testorg.local', 'partner.admin.1772331882@testorg.local', 'partner.superadmin.1772331882@testorg.local', 'partner.admin.1772331901@testorg.local', 'partner.superadmin.1772331901@testorg.local', 'partner.superadmin.default.1772331901@testorg.local', 'partner.admin.1772331917@testorg.local', 'partner.superadmin.1772331917@testorg.local', 'partner.superadmin.default.1772331917@testorg.local', 'partner.admin.1772331997@testorg.local'] E assert 'TEST_platform-admin-iter164@test.local' in ['admin@automateaccounts.local', 'cadrashtishah1@gmail.com', 'test-autoassign-1772309624@example.com', 'test-cancel-1772309625@example.com', 'test-autoassign-1772309797@example.com', 'test-cancel-1772309798@example.com', ...] E + where 'TEST_platform-admin-iter164@test.local' = <test_iter164_roles_permissions_redesign.TestPlatformAdminCreation object at 0xfdb6bbbb0a50>.TEST_EMAIL

testcase.name: test_platform_admin_has_module_permissions

failure.message: AssertionError: User not found assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter164_roles_permissions_redesign.py:251: in test_platform_admin_has_module_permissions assert user is not None, "User not found" E AssertionError: User not found E assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_roles_have_module_permissions

failure.message: AssertionError: Role TEST UI Role Iter136 missing module_permissions assert 'module_permissions' in {'access_level': 'read_only', 'created_at': '2026-02-27T04:17:37.070214+00:00', 'created_by': 'admin@automateaccounts.local', 'description': 'UI test role created by playwright', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter164_roles_permissions_redesign.py:384: in test_roles_have_module_permissions assert "module_permissions" in role, f"Role {role.get('name')} missing module_permissions" E AssertionError: Role TEST UI Role Iter136 missing module_permissions E assert 'module_permissions' in {'access_level': 'read_only', 'created_at': '2026-02-27T04:17:37.070214+00:00', 'created_by': 'admin@automateaccounts.local', 'description': 'UI test role created by playwright', ...}
